---
title: "Passport"
page-layout: article
---

# Passport

**Provider:** Euromonitor

## Description

Market research platform from Euromonitor with consumer, industry, country, and market data. Supports international market analysis, consumer trends, and business research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics

## Links

- [Access resource](http://web.library.yale.edu/access-passport)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
